Welcome to Ziva's Dashboard
A quick walkthrough to get you started — 5 steps
1
Log meals with Quick Log Tap the + button at the bottom → Feed → pick a meal (B/L/D/S) → type what Ziva ate → Save. Takes 10 seconds.
2
Log sleep & poop Same + button → Sleep (bedtime + wake time) or Poop (consistency + color). Naps have their own option too.
3
The Ziva Score The big number on Home combines sleep, diet, poop, medical & milestones into one score. It drops when data isn't logged — not because Ziva is doing poorly, but because the app needs your input. Tap it to see the breakdown.
4
"Can I Give This?" In the Track → Diet tab, scroll to the Can I Give This? card. Type any food to check if it's safe for Ziva's age, what nutrients it has, and what to pair it with.
5
Add new foods to the tracker In Track → Diet, find the Foods Introduced card. Type the food name, set the date, and mark it OK or Watch. This builds Ziva's food history and powers the nutrition analysis.

📝
Growth Overview
Percentiles compare Ziva to other babies her age. The 54th percentile means she's heavier than 54% of girls. Anything between 3rd and 97th is normal — what matters most is that she stays on her own curve over time, not the exact number.

Growth Velocity
Charts
Weight Chart
▾
🌍 WHO — the global gold standard, based on healthy breastfed babies from 6 countries. IAP recommends this for under-5 children.
🇮🇳 India — based on Indian national survey data (Khadilkar 2019). Indian babies typically track slightly lower than WHO, so Ziva's Indian percentile will be higher. Both are valid — WHO for global context, India for local context.

Fun & Insights
How Big is Ziva?
Growth Insights
▾
Vaccinations
Follows the Indian Academy of Pediatrics (IAP) schedule. Mild fever, fussiness, and swelling at the injection site are normal for 1-2 days after vaccination. Give paracetamol only if the doctor advises. Contact your paediatrician if fever exceeds 102°F or lasts more than 48 hours.
—
days

Past Vaccinations

Medications & Supplements
Vaccination Coverage
▾
Cross-checks Ziva's vaccination record against the complete IAP schedule. IAP = mandatory per Indian Academy of Pediatrics. IAP-Rec = strongly recommended by IAP. Private = optional, available at private clinics. Missing vaccines shown in red — discuss with your paediatrician.
Doctor Visits
Symptom Checker
Describe what you're noticing — fever, rash, fussiness, vomiting, etc. Get age-appropriate guidance and know when to call the doctor.
Visit Prep
Log & Check
Today's Meals
Log what Ziva eats each day. Type a food name and the autocomplete will suggest options. The ✨ insights below each meal show nutritional benefits — like when iron and Vitamin C are paired together. Don't worry about exact quantities at this age — exposure and variety matter more than amounts.
🌤 Breakfast skip
✨
☀️ Lunch skip
✨
🌙 Dinner skip
✨
🍪 Snack skip
✨
Can I Give This?
Ask about any food or combination — get safety info, a recipe, and dos & don'ts for Ziva's age.
Reference
Foods Introduced
Track every new food Ziva tries. The 3-day rule: introduce one new food at a time and wait 3 days before the next to spot any reactions. Mark foods as "⚠ Watch" if you notice rash, loose stools, or fussiness. The "X of Y" count shows how much variety she has in each food group.

Recommended Activities
Log Sleep
Log Night Sleep
Track Ziva's bedtime and wake time. At 6–8 months, babies typically need 11–12 hours of night sleep plus 2–3 naps totalling 2–3 hours. Logging sleep helps spot patterns and ensure she's getting enough rest.
0 No wake-ups
Log Nap

7-Day Sleep Trend
Sleep Guide
▾
Sleep Logs
▾
Log Diaper
Log Poop
Track Ziva's diaper changes. Monitoring colour, consistency, and frequency helps spot digestive issues early. At 6–7 months with solids starting, changes in poop are normal and expected.

📲 Install as App
iPhone: Tap the Share button (⬆) → "Add to Home Screen"
Android: Tap ⋮ menu → "Add to Home Screen" or "Install app"
To sync data: Use Settings → Data → Share Backup. Send the file via WhatsApp or any app, then import on the other phone.
Your data lives in this browser's localStorage (~5 MB limit). Export regularly via the Data tab to keep a backup.
💾 Storage —
💾 Last Manual Save —
🔄 Autosave Slots
Autosave triggers on data writes, at most once every 30 min. Two rolling slots — the older one gets overwritten.
How recovery works
If your data goes missing (browser clear, etc.), the app will detect it on next load and offer to restore from the most recent autosave. You can also manually restore from either slot above.
